name: Morgan Blake

production.db_writes: never — require Alex Rivera + Staff Engineer sign-off

escalation_triggers: Any P1 affecting Enterprise tier — page Alex Rivera (PagerDuty) if unresolved in 10 min
Any incident not resolved in 30 min — escalate to Lena Brandt (EM)
Any suspected data loss or security issue — use #security-incidents, do NOT use normal process
Any production DB write request — requires Alex Rivera + Staff Engineer, never autonomous
Any customer-facing communication — Morgan Blake reviews before send
safety_guardrails: Never run write commands on production infrastructure
Never acknowledge or close PagerDuty pages autonomously
Never send Zendesk replies without Morgan Blake review
Never share internal service names or architecture in external communications
Never speculate on root cause in customer-facing messages

hooks.description: Shell commands Claude Code executes automatically at lifecycle events

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '(INSERT|UPDATE|DELETE|DROP|ALTER|kubectl apply|terraform apply|aws.*put|aws.*delete|aws.*update)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Write or destructive infrastructure command detected. Production is read-only for Morgan. Requires Alex Rivera + Staff Engineer sign-off.'; exit 1; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '(dispatch-service|auth-service|job-service|internal.*architecture)'; then echo 'WARNING: Internal service name detected. If this is a customer-facing document (Zendesk/release notes), remove internal names before use.'; fi
echo 'Document written. Reminder: review before use — check safety_checklist.md. Zendesk drafts require Morgan review before sending. Runbook PRs require Lena Brandt review.'

echo 'Session complete. Before closing: (1) review any runbook changes against the quality checklist, (2) confirm no internal service names in customer-facing drafts, (3) raise runbook PRs for Lena Brandt review.'
